name: Brain MRI T2/FLAIR
description: Brain MRI T2-weighted and FLAIR sequence for fluid and lesion detection

findings.technique: Axial T2-weighted and FLAIR images were obtained through the brain.
findings.comparison: No prior MRI studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Parenchyma
sections.content: The cerebral parenchyma demonstrates [normal T2 signal / no abnormal hyperintensity / no demyelinating lesions].

sections.name: White Matter
sections.content: White matter shows [normal signal / no white matter lesions / no patches of abnormal FLAIR signal].

sections.name: Ventricles
sections.content: The ventricular system is [normal in size / no periventricular hyperintensity]. No hydrocephalus.

sections.name: Cortex
sections.content: Cortical gray matter [has normal thickness / no cortical lesions / no signal abnormality].

impression:
1. Normal T2/FLAIR study.
2. No abnormal T2 or FLAIR signal abnormalities identified.
